John Doe — Software Engineer

Summary
Senior engineer with 7 years building distributed systems in Go and Python.

Experience
- Designed kubernetes-based deployment platform reducing deploy times by 60%
- Built grpc APIs serving 10M requests/day with 99.95% uptime
- Migrated postgresql database to multi-region setup saving $200K/year
- Containerized 15 services with docker, reducing environment inconsistencies

Skills

Infrastructure: kubernetes, docker, terraform, aws
